title: Super Mario Addonpack
description: Become Mario and use the many power-ups from the Super Mario games
body:
This Palladium addon implements the power-ups from various Super Mario games into your minecraft world. The power-ups can be obtained by finding mystery blocks in your world or by buying them from wandering traders. This is a beta, so some features are still a little bugged.

# Obtaining Abilities
Mario and Luigi's abilities can be obtained through crafting their hats. When equiped you'll be given the option to unlock their abilities.

# Character's Abilities
**Mario**
- greater strength
- agility
- pyrokinesis

**Luigi**
- greater agility
- strength
- electrokinesis

# Power-ups
- Super Mushroom
- Fire Flower
- Ice Flower
- Metal Mushroom
- Mini Mushroom
- Cape Feather
- Frog Suit
- Mega Mushroom
- Starman
